'''tagojo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ignipotence|ignipotence]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-g-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ignipotence|ignipotence]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| tagojo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tægejeth|tægejeth]] || [[word:tægejej|tægejej]] || [[word:tægejesh|tægejesh]] || [[word:tægeje|tægeje]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tagogojoth|tagogojoth]] || [[word:tagogojoj|tagogojoj]] || [[word:tagogojosh|tagogojosh]] || [[word:tagogojo|tagogojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tagojoth|tagojoth]] || [[word:tagojoj|tagojoj]] || [[word:tagojosh|tagojosh]] || [[word:tagojo|tagojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tagofjofth|tagofjofth]] || [[word:tagofjofj|tagofjofj]] || [[word:tagofjofsh|tagofjofsh]] || [[word:tagofjof|tagofjof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tagojotho|tagojotho]] || [[word:tagojojo|tagojojo]] || [[word:tagojosho|tagojosho]] || [[word:tagojoko|tagojoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tagojoth|tagojoth]] || [[word:tagojoj|tagojoj]] || [[word:tagojosh|tagojosh]] || [[word:tagojo|tagojo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tagojothol|tagojothol]] || [[word:tagojojol|tagojojol]] || [[word:tagojoshol|tagojoshol]] || [[word:tagojokol|tagojokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tagojoothotho|tagojoothotho]] || [[word:tagojoojojo|tagojoojojo]] || [[word:tagojooshosho|tagojooshosho]] || [[word:tagojooko|tagojooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tagojothon|tagojothon]] || [[word:tagojojon|tagojojon]] || [[word:tagojoshon|tagojoshon]] || [[word:tagojokon|tagojokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tagojothooro|tagojothooro]] || [[word:tagojojooro|tagojojooro]] || [[word:tagojoshooro|tagojoshooro]] || [[word:tagojokooro|tagojokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d5728ff}}
